Body.Build: Glass front (Gorilla Glass 7i), aluminum frame, Gorilla Glass Victus (camera island only)
Body.SIM: Nano-SIM + Nano-SIM + eSIM (max 2 at a time)
Body.\u00a0:
IP64 dust tight and water resistant (water splashes)
Active matrix display (on the back)

Platform.OS: Android 16, up to 3 major Android upgrades, XOS 16
Platform.CPU: Octa-core (1x3.25 GHz Cortex-A725 & 3x3.0 GHz Cortex-A725 & 4x2.1 GHz Cortex-A725)

Main Camera.Triple:
200 MP, f/1.7, 23mm (wide), 1/1.4", 0.56µm, dual-pixel PDAF, OIS
50 MP, f/2.9, 80mm (periscope telephoto), 1/2.76", 0.64µm, dual-pixel PDAF, OIS, 3.5x optical zoom
8 MP, f/2.2, 112˚ (ultrawide), 1.12µm

Sound.\u00a0:
Tuned by JBL
24-bit/192kHz Hi-Res & Hi-Res wireless audio

Features.Sensors: Fingerprint (under display, optical), accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass, heart rate, SpO2
Features.\u00a0: Two-way satellite communication service (provided by Space42's Thuraya product line; requires separate plan and SIM)

Battery.Charging:
100W wired, 50% in 18 min, 100% in 48 min
50W wireless
7.5W reverse wired
5W reverse wireless
Bypass Charging (gaming, navigating)

Misc.Colors: Torino Black, Monza Red, Roma Silver, Amalfi Blue
